title: BorderColorLocked
text: BorderColorLocked Color of the panel button border when the button stays depressed. A web color name, system color name, or an RGB hexadecimal number (prefixed by a hash mark). (Decimal RGB colors are not supported.) This property can only be set in the .ini file. ;usys.ini [application] panel=upanel(BorderColorLocked= Color ) Copy For more information, see Standard Colors . For example: ;usys.ini [application] panel=upanel(backcolor=blue;backcolorlocked=white;BorderColorLocked=red) Copy Applies To Panels Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
